title: Shinomiya Kikoru's weapon
description: Turns the netherite axe to Shinomiya Kikoru's battle axe.
body:
This resourcepack turns the boring old netherite axe's texture to Shinomiya Kikoru's battle axe from the famous anime and manga "Kaiju No. 8"!

> btw it's my first project, I'd love some feedback ^_^ —Send it to this email: walver.wolf123456@gmail.com
